title: High-Risk AI Use Cases
description: Use cases classified as high-risk under the EU AI Act (Annex III) and corresponding risk categories from other frameworks.

categories.name: Biometrics
useCases: Remote biometric identification (not real-time in public spaces)
Biometric categorisation based on sensitive attributes
Emotion recognition in specific contexts

categories.name: Critical Infrastructure
useCases: AI safety components in road traffic management
AI in water, gas, heating, electricity supply management
AI in digital infrastructure operation

categories.name: Education and Vocational Training
useCases: AI determining access to educational institutions
AI evaluating learning outcomes
AI monitoring student behaviour during tests
AI assessing appropriate level of education for an individual

categories.name: Employment, Workers Management
useCases: AI for recruitment and candidate screening
AI making decisions on promotion, termination
AI for task allocation based on individual behaviour
AI monitoring and evaluating worker performance

categories.name: Access to Essential Services
useCases: AI evaluating creditworthiness
AI assessing eligibility for public benefits
AI for insurance risk assessment and pricing
AI prioritising emergency services dispatching

categories.name: Law Enforcement
useCases: AI assessing risk of criminal offending or reoffending
AI as polygraph or similar tool
AI evaluating reliability of evidence
AI profiling in criminal investigations

categories.name: Migration, Asylum and Border Control
useCases: AI as polygraph for asylum/visa applicants
AI assessing risks posed by persons entering territory
AI assisting in examination of asylum applications
AI for document authenticity verification

categories.name: Administration of Justice and Democratic Processes
useCases: AI assisting judicial authorities in researching and interpreting facts and law
AI applying law to concrete facts
AI used to influence outcome of elections or referendums
